title: Jumbo 6.5 Inch XL Carabiner Key Chain  - Black
description:
Attach one of these convenient carabiners to your backpack, water bottle, keys or purse to keep things handy and organized. The carabiners are constructed of durable aluminum and come with a key ring for easy attachment to just about anything. You want to be without one of these great carabiners on your next adventure. Make sure to grab a few of these to keep around the house, your office or outdoor gear! Please note: these carabiners are NOT FOR CLIMBING.
